---
title: "04 · Model & diagnostics"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

> Phase 4 — tutorial style. Governance:
> `.claude/policies/analysis/pre-specification.md`, `model-assumptions.md`,
> `sensitivity-analysis.md`.

Fit the **pre-specified** model (estimand defined before seeing results). Diagnose
assumptions with the **right residual** (randomized quantile residuals for
GLM/GAM via `statmod`/`DHARMa`; Schoenfeld for Cox; convergence checks for
Bayesian — R-hat/ESS or INLA PIT/CPO). Prefer plots to tests; a violation does
not automatically invalidate the model — comment on robustness and remedies, and
run sensitivity analyses.

```{r}
#| label: model
# fit  <- survival::coxph(...)            # example
# performance::check_model(fit)           # graphical diagnostics
# survival::cox.zph(fit)                  # PH test (after Schoenfeld plots)
```
